features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The wolf has Advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pack Hunter - Classic pack predator with prone control
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Pack Tactics for advantage when grouped with allies
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing damage with prone effect on Medium or smaller targets
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics advantage, prone-inducing bite, high perception (15)
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP individually, relies on pack for effectiveness
tactical_info.synergies: Devastating in groups, pairs well with dire wolves and werewolves
